# CWE-277 — Insecure Inherited Permissions (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-277-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"
	"syscall"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: clears umask so child files inherit overly permissive modes.
func CreateWorkspace(c *gin.Context) {
	old := syscall.Umask(0)
	defer syscall.Umask(old)
	_ = os.MkdirAll(c.Query("dir"), 0777)
	c.JSON(201, gin.H{"dir": c.Query("dir")})
}
